dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: coding activity at a glance
dashboard.resumeHeadline: Generate an ATS-Friendly CV Backed by Your Real Code
dashboard.resumeDescription: Analyze your GitHub contributions, merged PRs, and lines of code changed to automatically generate professional bullet points for your target roles.
dashboard.nightOwlTitle: Night Owl Milestone: You push code between Midnight and 4 AM!
dashboard.earlyBirdTitle: Early Bird Milestone: You push code between 5 AM and 8 AM!

auth.githubError: GitHub sign-in failed. This is usually caused by incorrect OAuth credentials or a mismatched callback URL. Check your GitHub OAuth App settings and try again.
auth.oauthCallbackError: The OAuth callback could not be completed. Please try signing in again.
auth.oauthSigninError: Could not start the GitHub sign-in flow. Please try again.
auth.configurationError: There is a server configuration error. Please contact the site administrator.
auth.accessDeniedError: Access was denied. You may have cancelled the GitHub authorization.
auth.verificationError: The sign-in link has expired or has already been used.
auth.defaultError: An unexpected authentication error occurred. Please try again.
auth.tagline: Track streaks, PR velocity & coding growth.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDescription: Choose the display language used across DevTrack.
settings.profileDescription: Manage your public profile, dashboard preferences, and integrations.
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose the theme that matches your workflow.
settings.weeklyDigestDescription: Receive an optional weekly email digest every Monday morning summarizing your coding habits.
settings.notificationsDescription: Send a weekly summary of your activity to Slack or Discord via webhook.
settings.connectedAccountsDescription: Link additional GitHub accounts and switch between them on the dashboard.
settings.wakatimeDescription: Connect your Wakatime account to display accurate coding time and language usage.
settings.discordDescription: Receive streak reminders and milestone alerts in your Discord server.
settings.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes in your settings. If you leave now, your progress will be lost.
